title: US outlines its $5 billion Genesis Mission to boost science with AI - Engadget
summary: Several federal agencies are contributing toward the interdisciplinary research efforts. Participants will work toward accomplishing National Science and Technology Challenges , making contributions in the form of research awards, funding opportunities, specialized scientific datasets and research facilities.
